revision.text: The pages listed below have been identified as containing information specific to [[{{{1}}}]] without adequately covering differences found in other parts of the world. Use {{Tlx|Globalize|2=article|3={{{1|}}}}} or {{Tlx|Globalize|2=section|3={{{1|}}}}} in an article to place it into this category.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize_category%2FCore here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> The pages listed below have been identified as containing information specific to [[{{{1}}}]] without adequately covering differences found in other parts of the world. Use {{Tlx|Globalize|2=article|3={{{1|}}}}} or {{Tlx|Globalize|2=section|3={{{1|}}}}} in an article to place it into this category. <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
